name: Invoice Ninja

inputs.label: app key
inputs.help: Encryption key — auto-generated if left blank.

compose:
name: slashnode-invoice-ninja
services:
  nginx:
    image: nginx:1.21-alpine
    container_name: invoice-ninja-nginx
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    init: true
    depends_on:
      - app
    volumes:
      - nginx_config-nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/nginx.conf:ro
      - nginx_data-public:/var/www/html/public:ro
      - nginx_data-fake-..-storage:/var/www/html/storage:ro
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8676:80
  app:
    image: invoiceninja/invoiceninja-debian:5.13.26
    container_name: invoice-ninja-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_started
      redis:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      APP_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:8676
      APP_KEY: ${secret.APP_KEY}
      APP_ENV: production
      APP_DEBUG: 'false'
      REQUIRE_HTTPS: 'false'
      DB_HOST: invoice-ninja-db
      DB_DATABASE: invoiceninja
      DB_USERNAME: invoiceninja
      DB_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrrr
      IN_USER_EMAIL: admin@example.com
      IN_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      IS_DOCKER: 'true'
      CACHE_DRIVER: redis
      QUEUE_CONNECTION: redis
      SESSION_DRIVER: redis
      REDIS_HOST: invoice-ninja-redis
      REDIS_PASSWORD: 'null'
      REDIS_PORT: '6379'
      FILESYSTEM_DISK: debian_docker
    volumes:
      - app_data-public:/var/www/html/public
      - app_data-fake-..-storage:/var/www/html/storage
  db:
    image: mariadb:11.4.5
    container_name: invoice-ninja-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: invoiceninja
      MYSQL_USER: invoiceninja
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrrr
      MYSQL_DATABASE: invoiceninja
      MARIADB_AUTO_UPGRADE: 'true'
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/mysql
  redis:
    image: redis:7.4.3
    container_name: invoice-ninja-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - redis_data-redis:/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  nginx_config-nginx.conf:
    name: slashnode-invoice-ninja_nginx_config-nginx.conf
  nginx_data-public:
    name: slashnode-invoice-ninja_nginx_data-public
  nginx_data-fake-..-storage:
    name: slashnode-invoice-ninja_nginx_data-fake-..-storage
  app_data-public:
    name: slashnode-invoice-ninja_app_data-public
  app_data-fake-..-storage:
    name: slashnode-invoice-ninja_app_data-fake-..-storage
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-invoice-ninja_db_data-db
  redis_data-redis:
    name: slashnode-invoice-ninja_redis_data-redis
